sentences.arabic: فِي عَالَمٍ يَتَغَيَّرُ بِسُرْعَةٍ، أَصْبَحَ التَّعَلُّمُ مَدَى الْحَيَاةِ ضَرُورَةً مُلِحَّةً لَا رَفَاهِيَةً.
sentences.translation: U svijetu koji se brzo mijenja, cjeloživotno učenje postalo je hitna potreba, a ne luksuz.
sentences.translationEn: In a rapidly changing world, lifelong learning has become an urgent necessity, not a luxury.

sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ الثَّقَافَةُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ الْآنَ مَهَارَةً جَوْهَرِيَّةً مَطْلُوبَةً فِي مُعْظَمِ الْمِهَنِ الْحَدِيثَةِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalna pismenost se sada smatra suštinskom vještinom koja se traži u većini modernih profesija.
sentences.translationEn: Digital literacy is now considered a core skill required in most modern professions.

sentences.arabic: تُوَفِّرُ الْمِنَصَّاتُ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةُ دَوْرَاتٍ مَرِنَةً تُلَبِّي احْتِيَاجَاتِ الْمُحْتَرِفِينَ الْعَامِلِينَ.
sentences.translation: Elektronske platforme pružaju fleksibilne kurseve koji zadovoljavaju potrebe zaposlenih profesionalaca.
sentences.translationEn: Electronic platforms provide flexible courses that meet the needs of working professionals.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ التَّكَيُّفَ مَعَ التَّقْنِيَاتِ الْجَدِيدَةِ يَضْمَنُ لِلْفَرْدِ الْبَقَاءَ مُنَافِسًا فِي سُوقِ الْعَمَلِ.
sentences.translation: Prilagođavanje novim tehnologijama garantuje pojedincu da ostane konkurentan na tržištu rada.
sentences.translationEn: Adapting to new technologies ensures that an individual remains competitive in the job market.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمَعْرِفَةُ رِحْلَةٌ مُسْتَمِرَّةٌ لَا تَنْتَهِي بِمُجَرَّدِ الْحُصُولِ عَلَى شَهَادَةِ التَّخَرُّجِ.
sentences.translation: Znanje je kontinuirano putovanje koje ne završava samim dobijanjem diplome o diplomiranju.
sentences.translationEn: Knowledge is a continuous journey that does not end merely by obtaining a graduation certificate.
